parameters.query: INSERT INTO grocery_items (item_name, quantity, requested_by, requested_by_name, estimated_price, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'pending') RETURNING id

SELECT store, item_keyword, description, price, valid_until, to_char(scraped_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS as_of FROM specials WHERE $1 ILIKE '%' || item_keyword || '%' OR item_keyword ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR similarity(item_keyword, $1) > 0.3 ORDER BY similarity(item_keyword, $1) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT (SELECT budget_amount FROM categories WHERE id = 8) AS budget, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(actual_price) FROM grocery_items WHERE status = 'bought' AND bought_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), 0) AS bought, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(estimated_price) FROM grocery_items WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), 0) AS pending_est
